programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones and the Phantom Train of Doom
programme.desc: Indy and his friend Remy infiltrate German lines in 1916 Africa to knock a dangerous cannon out of commission.

programme.title: Gidget
programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahoona (Cliff Robertson).

programme.title: A Big Hand for the Little Lady
programme.desc: Married homesteaders (Henry Fonda, Joanne Woodward) stop at a Texas hotel, where he loses big at poker and she takes his place.

programme.title: Harper
programme.desc: A rich woman (Lauren Bacall) hires gum-chewing Los Angeles private eye Lew Harper (Paul Newman) to look for her missing husband.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: The queen of Egypt (Elizabeth Taylor) seduces Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison), but when he is killed, she uses Mark Antony (Richard Burton) as her new protector.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Southern writer (Peter MacNicol) lives in Brooklyn with an Auschwitz survivor (Meryl Streep) and her mad lover (Kevin Kline).

programme.title: Fractured Flickers
programme.desc: Hans Conried and a celebrity guest present a succession of film clips from the silent picture era dubbed over with comedic dialogue and sound effects.

programme.title: The Hustler
programme.desc: A gambler (George C. Scott) stakes pool shark Fast Eddie Felson (Paul Newman) in a smoke-filled marathon against Minnesota Fats (Jackie Gleason).

programme.title: Getting Green
programme.desc: A weekly half-hour series offering practical tips on greening your lifestyle.

programme.title: Getting Green
programme.desc: A weekly half-hour series offering practical tips on greening your lifestyle.

programme.title: Made in Hollywood: Teen Edition
programme.desc: Spotlights new movies and DVDs.

programme.title: Made in Hollywood: Teen Edition
programme.desc: Spotlights new movies and DVDs.

programme.title: Peyton Place
programme.desc: The secret life of a small New England community is revealed in this adaptation of Grace Metalious' novel.

programme.title: Return to Peyton Place
programme.desc: Allison MacKenzie (Carol Lynley) alarms her New England neighbors with the publication of her gossipy first book.

programme.title: Patterns
programme.desc: A New York corporate boss (Everett Sloane) grooms an Ohio engineer (Van Heflin) for the No. 2 man's (Ed Begley) job.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: A former Scotland Yard superintendent attempts to commit the perfect murder in the hopes of discrediting his successor.

programme.title: Boomerang!
programme.desc: A prosecutor begins to doubt his own case against a vagrant accused of murdering a clergyman in cold blood.

programme.title: Macon County Line
programme.desc: A 1950's sheriff in Georgia places the blame on two guys and one innocent girl for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Pit Stop
programme.desc: The owner of a racing organization hires a reckless stock car driver who is determined to win at any cost.

programme.title: Wild Guitar
programme.desc: A Hollywood wheeler-dealer (William Watters) exploits a motorcycling rock 'n' roller (Arch Hall Jr.) new in town.

programme.title: Happy Land
programme.desc: An Iowa drugstore owner (Don Ameche) mourns his soldier son; his own father's ghost (Harry Carey) gives him hope.

programme.title: Lifeboat
programme.desc: A chic writer (Tallulah Bankhead), a stoker (William Bendix) and others drift with the U-boat captain (Walter Slezak) who has sunk their ship.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma
programme.desc: Marines (Richard Widmark, Jack Palance, Robert Wagner) in the South Pacific try to capture Japanese who can point them to a rocket base.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: A rancher (Van Heflin) needing cash is hired to put an outlaw (Glenn Ford) on the train to Yuma prison.

programme.title: Rachel and the Stranger
programme.desc: A frontier widower (William Holden) treats his bride (Loretta Young) like a servant, until a passing stranger (Robert Mitchum) pays her attention.

programme.title: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Prospectors (Clark Gable, Jack Oakie) and an abandoned woman (Loretta Young) mush the Yukon with a dog sled led by Buck.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: As governor of Jamaica, buccaneer Henry Morgan (Laird Cregar) sends a swashbuckler (Tyrone Power) to capture renegade pirates.

programme.title: Gidget
programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahoona (Cliff Robertson).

programme.title: A Summer Place
programme.desc: A man (Richard Egan) and a woman's (Dorothy McGuire) Maine-coast adultery parallels his teenage daughter's (Sandra Dee) romance with her son.

programme.title: Breaking Away
programme.desc: An Indiana teen (Dennis Christopher) acts Italian as he and his townie buddies (Dennis Quaid, Daniel Stern) compete with college snobs.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and has a friend cover up the act with a burglary, only to have the friend blackmail him into doing the same favor in return.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo keeps a close watch on a physical-fitness fanatic suspected of murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prominent photographer hatches a scheme to cover up his wife's murder with a phony kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A military-academy commandant murders to protect his career and prevent his school's conversion to a coed junior college.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo's Mexico cruise is disrupted when an automobile executive kills his blackmailing lover, the ship's singer, then frames a musician.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (George Hamilton) romances a wealthy patient (Lesley Ann Warren) then uses her in his alibi after killing her husband (Stephen Elliott).

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired actress/dancer stages her wealthy husband's suicide after he refuses to finance her Broadway comeback.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer , a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew , whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo

programme.title: The Old Man and the Sea
programme.desc: An old Cuban fisherman (Spencer Tracy) has not caught anything in 84 days. Despite the devotion of the young boy (Felipe Pazos) who brings him coffee and food, the fisherman fears he has become perpetually unlucky. On his 85th day of fishing, the old man catches a small fish and decides to keep fishing. When one of his multiple fishing lines hooks a large marlin, he decides to not return to shore

programme.title: Born Free
programme.desc: At a national park in Kenya, English game warden George Adamson (Bill Travers) and his wife, Joy (Virginia McKenna), care for three orphaned lion cubs. programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In Australia, in the popular city of Melbourne are two hotels that attract visitors from around the world. In the heart of the city is the oldest heritage hotel in Australia. And an hour's drive South of the city is the vineyard hotel The Jackalope.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke heads to the city of Bangalore in southern India; he visits MTR, one of the oldest coffee houses in the city; he learns how to make idli; he meets up with a friend to explore the night markets.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke learns about Kongunadu cuisine in Coimbatore, partners with a family in Thrissur to create an authentic delicacy and learns about India's rich coffee culture.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the port city of Kochi, Kerala, where he checks out the iconic Chinese fishing nets, does laundry the old-fashioned way and cooks a famous dish. He leaves the city to witness the state's backwaters and local fishing techniques.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the lush plantations of spices in Thekkady and then tours Madurai, the spiritual heart of Tamil Nadu, to find hidden gems with the help of a local food journalist.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
